channel.title: Fan Work (new posts)
channel.description: Posts in the forum category "Fan Work" - A place where fan projects, art, and other stuff can be shown off or pimped, as needed.

item.title: SCP short film?: Re: SCP short film?
item.content:encoded: Yes. also, WDB is also one of my favorite scps.

item.title: Uncontained: An SCP Card Game: Re: Uncontained: An SCP Card Game
item.content:encoded: maybe add some of the 001 proposals, like "When Day Breaks"

item.title: ReadOut: "My first ambition was to be an orphan." - Tom Baker
item.content:encoded:
New in November and December 2020 (57 Items): Open
New in November and December 2020 (57 Items): Close

· SCP-001 - The Gate Guardian (Dr Clef's Proposal)

item.title: Omega Point: Re: Omega Point
item.content:encoded: MY EARS! I love it!

item.title: Converted a few scips to pdfs, and created a site to host 'em!: Re: Converted a few scips to pdfs, and created a site to host 'em!
item.content:encoded: I can't belive how much time it took you to make this! I am sure the author's of these great SCP's will be happy to see it!

item.title: Uncontained: An SCP Card Game: Re: Uncontained: An SCP Card Game
item.content:encoded: Hey! Could you add SCP-4000?

item.title: Amazing SCP Artbooks!: Amazing SCP Artbooks!
item.content:encoded:
A few days ago someone sent me to this Instagram account by the name of para.books in which they have created an indiegogo page in order to raise funds to create some SCP Artbooks. They look really interesting and I want to help them out as much as possible, since I can't buy the books at the current time, So I figured I would also share it here! They also seem to be gaining a lot of traction in the SCP community so if you wanted to get them I would personally recommend getting them ASAP! I'm a little I won't be able to get any myself when I do come into some money after the holiday session is over haha.

Here is a link to their stuff:
Instagram:https://www.instagram.com/para.books/
Indiegogo page: https://www.indiegogo.com/projects/scp-foundation-artbooks#/

item.title: Converted a few scips to pdfs, and created a site to host 'em!: Re: Converted a few scips to pdfs, and created a site to host 'em!
item.content:encoded: Dude, that's looks so beautiful, especially the first image, good luck and i want to see more like that. :)

item.title: Converted a few scips to pdfs, and created a site to host 'em!: Re: Converted a few scips to pdfs, and created a site to host 'em!
item.content:encoded: This looks really cool!

item.title: Converted a few scips to pdfs, and created a site to host 'em!: Converted a few scips to pdfs, and created a site to host 'em!
item.content:encoded:
I turned a few scips into pdfs a while ago, and I've done it again, with slightly cleaner formatting - currently I've done 15 scips, (including 093, which took a while aaaa).

I've also quickly whipped up a site for which to host the pdfs, which I'll update as I format more - https://sandro.is-a.dev/scipnet/

+ Some images (including a 3D render)
- Close
The 3D render:

A snippet of 093, in its twenty-seven page glory:

231 includes the hidden text:

The site itself:

I'm currently working off a list of the top few scips of each year (also serves to help me discover and read the classics), but, uh, lemme know if you've got any recommendations, I guess!

item.title: Photos of SCP Foundation Playing Cards: Re: Photos of SCP Foundation Playing Cards
item.content:encoded: ok now those look amazing.

item.title: I draw SCPs in Comic Book style: Re: I draw and make videos of SCPs in Comic Book style
item.content:encoded:
wow :o
That's pretty cool

item.title: I draw SCPs in Comic Book style: I draw and make videos of SCPs in Comic Book style
item.content:encoded:
Well, basically, I'm an Art Director which means drawing and designing stuff is my second nature.
I always had something to do on the side apart from my work and have been trying different things but none of them lasted long. Eventually, I realized that I want to create cartoons and created a YouTube channel. Turned out, I'm not a great writer and I suck at writing scripts so I decided to take SCP articles as scripts and go from there.

With all that said, here's some of my work that I want to share with you guys! Let's start with the first one I made - SCP-1048. Leave your thoughts/suggestions/opinions.

SCP-1048 - Builder Bear

item.title: SCP-1875 fan recreation: SCP-1875 fan recreation
item.content:encoded:
The image
So I spent the last two days creating this thing. Hope you like it :)

item.title: Omega Point: Re: Omega Point
item.content:encoded: Dude, this is what I want to listen to forever! … you're awesome.

item.title: Escape from Site 19 - Released after 7 years!: Re: Escape from Site 19 - Released after 7 years!
item.content:encoded:
Hello to all SCP fans,

Long time no see. Last couple of months we were tremendously busy. But finally,
after
• 7 years of developing,
• 100 weekends of beta testing,
• 14 different suppliers,
• 90 hours of packing,
• incalculable amount of sweat, tears and joy.

We´re happy to announce… the first batch of 200 games is on its way!
Would you like to get a first glimpse of the game? We have couple of unboxing videos to check out.

English [https://youtu.be/wQOtGGqwg6Y]
Italian [https://youtu.be/JJJh3T9CBzM]
Polish [https://youtu.be/yQA8ImMBrbU]
German [https://youtu.be/Zg2FhZ7Pxd4]

Escape from Site 19 Team
Instagram[https://instagram.com/escapefromsite19?igshid=1t9jd7jxnoeil]
Discord [https://discord.com/invite/GXPQKBBrrH]
Twitter [https://twitter.com/EFS_19?s=09]
Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/escapefromsite19]

item.title: Proto-Sarkic "Folk" song demo: Re: Proto-Sarkic "Folk" song demo
item.content:encoded: REALLY WELL DONE! You deserve much more attention for this!

item.title: "Official" SCP-999 Art: "Official" SCP-999 Art
item.content:encoded:
My artwork of SCP-999

Many years ago, I wrote SCP-999. I've made a few other SCPs, but 999 is by far the most popular one I made, and quite possibly the most popular OC I've made. Even today I'm still floored by the sheer amount of fanart and videos this adorable little blob has spawned.

Yet despite all of this, I myself had yet to actually draw my own picture of SCP-999… until today! So consider this the first and thus far only piece of official SCP-999 art!

I actually started this last year as an excuse to try out some lineless painting, but only recently finished it.

item.title: Document Leaks: Re: Document Leaks
item.content:encoded: Beautiful design, and beautiful overall montage. Crazy how good is indesign.
